title_ja: 夜のソファ・スマホ手前・細眼鏡・ローライト
title_en: Night couch lean, phone in foreground, thin metal glasses, low-light candid
reference_note: Not a mirror shot. English: prompt_en.md. Riamero: fictional Japanese woman, narrow age band; clear skin without moles or freckles.

subject.description: Young adult woman with soft refined features, thin metal-framed glasses, shoulder-length dark hair, leaning across a couch at night holding a smartphone — quiet low-light candid, not a mirror selfie.

eyes.direction: Toward camera as if just looked up from phone

expression.overall: Dreamy late-night, calm, distant, mildly alluring without exaggeration

face.note_when_no_reference: Delicate proportions, narrow jawline, soft cheeks, defined eyes; soft glam: subtle eyeliner, long natural-looking lashes, smooth skin finish, glossy pink-nude lips, lightly defined brows; clear skin without moles or freckles

hair.style: Shoulder-length, loose, softly tousled with slight volume at crown
hair.effect: Natural flyaways, soft separation, not salon-rigid

body.legs: Bare, partially folded, extending toward or out of frame

skin.visible_areas: Shoulders, collarbones, arms, upper chest, thighs, lower legs as visible in frame
skin.texture: Smooth, velvety, softened by low light and gentle lens blur; clear without moles or freckles
skin.lighting_effect: Warm ambient on skin; faint cool phone-screen reflections on face and hands

pose.position: Leaning forward across couch, one arm supporting body, other hand holding smartphone toward foreground
pose.overall: Informal intimate slight off-balance, paused while scrolling then looked up

layered_from_skin_outward: Pale cream sleepwear set with soft blush tint: lace-trim camisole or slip-style top, thin straps, delicate lace, soft fitted lightweight bodice
Matching pale cream soft shorts or lower slip portion, mostly partially obscured, softly wrinkled

accessories.device: Smartphone held close to camera plane, dark reflective case, screen glow on fingers
accessories.prop: Thin metal-framed eyeglasses with visible screen reflections on lenses

photography.camera_style: Realistic social-media night portrait, smartphone candid aesthetic
photography.angle: Slightly above eye level, close intimate, phone hand entering foreground
photography.texture: Soft focus, slight motion blur, low-light grain, gentle smoothing from dim exposure, natural imperfect sharpness
photography.lighting: Dim warm room light plus cool phone-screen fill on face and hands; no hard flash
photography.depth_of_field: Shallow to moderate; face priority, softened; foreground hand and phone slightly blurred

background.setting: Indoor living room or lounge at night
background.atmosphere: Quiet private late-night, softly blurred still
background.lighting: Very low ambient tungsten-like room light, shadows in background

the_vibe.aesthetic: Realistic social softness, low-light candid beauty, imperfect magnetic
the_vibe.authenticity: Accidental blur, off-center angle, screen glare on glasses, lived-in couch posture
the_vibe.story: Scrolling in silence, then looked up for one quiet second

must_keep: Thin metal glasses with screen reflections on lenses
Dark shoulder-length tousled hair per reference or brief
avoid_as_positive_style: Not studio key lights or seamless backdrop
Not bright daylight window as main source
Not heavy jewelry or cluttered room
Not broad smile or stiff formal symmetry
